name: Advanced Diagnosis Phase 7 - Exact Rubric Confirmation and Patient/Visit Linking
new_features: confirm exact repertory path and rubric id for each suggested rubric
rubric match quality badges: Exact/Strong/Good/Fuzzy/Weak/Not found
open exact confirmed rubric by rid when possible
repertorization uses confirmed rubric id/path first
saved ADX records include patientId and visitRef
similar-case scoring gives bonus for same patient
recent ADX records table shows patient/visit column
note: Exact rubric confirmation still requires doctor review; fuzzy matches should be opened and verified before final prescription.
